creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to oleg from comment #11)

No need to resend the commits.  What I mean by "changelog" is a changelog for angie and the modules, i.e. what changed from the version currently in ports to 1.3.1.  Any new features?  Bug fixes?  Security issues fixed? Etc.  If angie has a changelog, it is sufficient if you just give me the link.
